title: helia chelonoides
intro: Helia chelonoides, also known as the tortoiseshell flower or heliotrope, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as anxiety, insomnia, and inflammation due to its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Helia chelonoides include reducing stress and promoting relaxation, as well as supporting cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve drying and infusing the flowers in hot water to create a tea or using the plant in capsule form, though more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
